headline: How The Story Is Shifting For ARC Resources (TSX:ARX) As Analyst Views Diverge
summary: ARC Resources is now carrying a refreshed fair value estimate of about CA$31.21, up from CA$30.29, a change that puts a slightly higher price tag on what analysts think the shares could be worth. That move comes as some firms lift their targets by roughly CA$2 while others trim theirs by CA$1 to CA$4, creating a split view on where the stock should trade. Read on to see what is driving this tension and how you can track the evolving analyst story from here. Stay updated as the Fair Value for...

headline: How The Investment Story For Agree Realty (ADC) Is Shifting With New Targets And Funding Moves
summary: Agree Realty’s updated analyst work now pegs Fair Value at US$85.39, compared with the prior US$84.25. This puts a fresh spotlight on where the share price might sit relative to these revised targets. That shift comes alongside Street research that combines higher price targets in the low US$90s with at least one downgrade, reflecting a blend of confidence in execution and caution on valuation. Read on to see how to interpret these moving targets and keep track of the evolving narrative...
